title: Reef Manifold: Maximizing Distinct Serviceable Reaches
strategies: contiguous ramp baseline: install offsets {0,1,...,k-1}; sumset is a solid block of 2k-1 reaches (the checker's baseline)

Mian-Chowla greedy: scan offsets 0..V in order, install each iff it keeps every pairwise sum distinct (a Sidon set); near-optimal when the range is loose, but stalls early and undersizes when the range is tight

randomized Sidon-core + marginal-gain extension: build a Sidon core from several seeded scan offsets, then fill up to k fittings by repeatedly adding the offset that creates the most new distinct reaches; keep the best sumset over restarts
algebraic Sidon construction: place offsets via a perfect-difference / Erdos-Turan (i, 2*p*i+(i*i mod p)) pattern to pack many distinct sums into a bounded range
